sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 77:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 77:1
items.html: The ten Sefirot of the Rosh are regarded as the essence and the self of the light. From the Peh of Rosh downward, they are regarded as the light of consequence of the lights of the ten Sefirot of Rosh. However, this applies from the world of Beria downward. (Part 3, Chapter 8, item 9)
